description: WebAPP before 0.9.9.5 does not properly filter certain characters in contexts related to (1) the query string, (2) Profiles, (3) the Forum Post icon field, (4) the Edit Profile, and (5) the Gallery, which has unknown impact and remote attack vectors, possibly related to cross-site scripting (XSS).
